# runSolution

> Executes a solution — loads config, calls LLM, tracks run, emits events

## Inputs

| Parameter | Type | Required |
|-----------|------|----------|
| solutionId | string | yes |
| organizationId | string | yes |
| input | json | yes |
| db | Database | yes |

## Steps

```mermaid
graph TD
  A[solution: call findSolutionById]
  A --> B[run: call createSolutionRun]
  B --> C[llmResult: call openai.invoke]
  C --> D[completed: call updateSolutionRun]
  D --> E[emitCompleted: call emitSolutionRunCompleted]
  E --> F[result: return]
```

## Output

Type: `SolutionRun`

## Error Handling

- **LlmError**: log-and-continue
